subject: FW: ██████████████
body: Jeff – one of my friends sent me this today – it is the press release of the day I left DJT – how well I remember – I thought u would get a kick out of it -- Nick
body_html: Jeff – one of my friends sent me this today – it is the press release of the day I left DJT – how well I remember – I thought u would get a kick out of it -- Nick
